objective: Compare LLM providers/models on a fresh-world Minecraft runtime task: collect wood, craft table/sticks/wooden_pickaxe, equip/hold the pickaxe, and build a visible six-block wood/log worksite marker.

scoring.strict_user_target: wooden_pickaxe evidence + equipped/held wooden_pickaxe evidence + at least six unique oak_log/oak_planks structure blocks placed by the actor.
scoring.structure_target_without_equip: wooden_pickaxe evidence + at least six unique oak_log/oak_planks structure blocks placed by the actor. This is tracked because Qwen Plus reached this but did not show explicit equip/held-pickaxe evidence.
scoring.excluded: Tool schema and structured argument compliance are not benchmark targets; they remain provider/runtime contract assumptions and may be analyzed after the run.

conditions.world_reset: fresh_world per model run, same scenario/seed, isolated workspace
conditions.visual_evidence: prismarine-viewer screenshots every 5 cycles plus initial/final when available
conditions.qwen_reasoning_condition: ModelScope Qwen runs used adapter-level chat_template_kwargs.enable_thinking=false and SOCIAL_CYCLE_REASONING=qwen-no-think; no OpenAI-style reasoning.effort setting was available for this path.

external_notes.label: Qwen quickstart and thinking budget notes

runs.label: GPT-5.5

budget_status.reason: No provider usage budget matched this provider/model

budget.source: local operator cap for private ModelScope Qwen API-Inference use; official docs expose daily request quotas, while this monthly cap is enforced only by the repo-local usage ledger
